MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSK, MEL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-12-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT WEIGAND, HEATHER
JUDGE PRO TEM - JAMES BEDELL, REPORTER - SHERRY SAWYER, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEIGAND, HEATHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1229 CHESTNUT STREET #14, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-18-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. RENT AND DAMAGES WAIVED UNLESS DEFT FAILS TO VACATE, THEN AN AMENDED JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE $1500-. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. PLTF RETAINS SECUR DEPOSIT. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
